aliases.description: Aliases to add to the Oligo

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the Oligo's authors.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the Oligo. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Fields to set on the Oligo. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the Oligo.
